themes.reasoning_notes: Aura itself, so it naturally fits Aura/enchantress shells as a cheap enchantment that sticks on a creature.
Grants repeatable rummaging: discard a card to draw a card, giving ongoing filtering/card-selection from the enchanted creature.
The activated ability requires discarding, which can enable discard-synergy or graveyard setup, though only as a support piece.
It is a one-mana Aura, so its clearest deckbuilding home is Aura/enchantments shells rather than a generic utility card.
It grants a repeatable discard outlet via the enchanted creature, which is relevant for discard-synergy and graveyard setup.
